question:
Yumpuses are hot. Each yumpus is a rompus. Rompuses are happy. Rompuses are impuses. Each impus is not amenable. Every impus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are opaque. Dumpuses are tumpuses. Numpuses are small. Tumpuses are orange. Every tumpus is a wumpus. Wumpuses are not small. Wumpuses are vumpuses. Every vumpus is fruity. Every vumpus is a jompus. Jompuses are not dull. Every jompus is a zumpus. Sally is a rompus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sally is small.
